description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a dark, hipped roof and a prominent covered front porch supported by square columns. The exterior features a combination of dark siding and lighter horizontal trim bands, giving it a modern Craftsman appearance. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, with the front facade showcasing a central entryway and a set of steps leading up to the porch. The house includes an attached garage on one side, seamlessly integrated into the overall structure. The roof has multiple hips and a single chimney, while the rear and side elevations display additional large windows and a secondary covered area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a balanced, geometric form.
description: A two-story, dark-sided house with a hipped roof, large windows, and a covered front porch supported by columns. Features include an attached garage, symmetrical window arrangement, and modern Craftsman styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, steps, and columns, as well as the attached garage on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting a large, projecting section with multiple windows and the back of the garage.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the full length of the house, large windows, and the integration of the garage and rear extension.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the side of the porch, and the overall rectangular form of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered porch, square columns, and a wide overhanging roof.
